description_long: This is a cylindrical, industrial fire hydrant painted in a weathered orange color with a black base. The hydrant features a domed top with a central operating nut, two side hose connection outlets capped and secured with metal chains, and a front-facing outlet with a square nut. The surface shows signs of wear, including scratches and faded paint, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The caps and nuts are metallic, and the chains are visibly attached to the side outlets. The hydrant is robustly constructed, likely from cast iron or steel, and is designed to be a fixed emergency water source in urban environments.
description: A weathered orange fire hydrant with a domed top, three capped outlets, and metal chains securing the side caps. The hydrant has a sturdy black base and visible signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed top, central operating nut, two side outlets with caps and chains, and the black base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting one side outlet with its cap and chain, and partial visibility of the front outlet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the hydrant, both side outlets with caps and chains, and the central outlet nut.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the other side outlet and its cap and chain, with some markings visible on the body.
